description: Style Note Add a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product Details Ethnic mango shaped earring Purple stone floral detail with pearl like beads around it Purple single tear drop shaped dangler with pearl like beads dangling at the intersection Fish hook backMaterial and Care Metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 57 mm
